goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 11:30' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 11:30 and should leave on monday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to bishops stortford
Make sure you get arrival time and price
